institution.name: Southcentral Kentucky Community and Technical College

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southcentral Kentucky Community and Technical College fell 37% between 2006 and 2009 (56.7% → 35.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southcentral Kentucky Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southcentral Kentucky Community and Technical College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southcentral Kentucky Community and Technical College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8k → 3.3k).
